response.overview: When a lonely, recently single woman rescues a houseplant in need of serious TLC – and then falls in love with it – she must discover what the plant really wants, or risk losing herself forever.
response.tagline: When a lonely, recently single woman rescues a houseplant in need of serious TLC – and then falls in love with it – she must discover what the plant really wants, or risk losing herself forever.
response.title: Sunlight Water
